recommendations.title: Retroactive
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Action, Crime, Drama, Adventure
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist makes multiple trips through time to save a woman that was murdered by her brutal husband.

recommendations.title: Werewolf: The Beast Among Us
recommendations.overview: Set in a 19th century village, a young man studying under a local doctor joins a team of hunters on the trail of a wolf-like creature.

recommendations.title: Bats
recommendations.overview: Genetically mutated bats escape and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

recommendations.title: Memories of Murder
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial rapist and murderer of young women terrorizes a small province in 1980s South Korea. To prevent further crimes, three increasingly desperate detectives with conflicting methods race against time to unravel the violent mind of the ki

recommendations.title: The Plagues of Breslau
recommendations.overview: Every day at 6 pm a serial killer kills another person. Police officer Helena Rus thinks the killings are done by one man only and decides to reveal the killer's identity by getting back in 18th century history of the city.

recommendations.title: The Zodiac
recommendations.overview: An elusive serial killer known as the Zodiac terrorizes the San Francisco Bay in the late 1960s, while detectives aim to stop him before he claims more victims. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: The Last Matinee
recommendations.overview: In 1993, spectators at the last screening of a horror film at a downtown cinema fall one by one into the hands of a sadistic and ruthless killer.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.
